name: Chocolate-Caramel-Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine graham cracker crumbs and butter. Stir well until the mixture is moistened.
2. Press the mixture evenly onto the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Unwrap the caramels and combine them with milk in a heatproof bowl.
4. Heat over low heat, stirring often, until the caramels are melted.
5. Pour the caramel mixture over the graham cracker crust.
6. Sprinkle chopped pecans evenly over the caramel layer and set aside.
7. Beat cream cheese at high speed until light and fluffy.
8. Gradually add sugar, mixing well after each addition.
9. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each egg is incorporated.
10. Stir in vanilla extract and chocolate morsels; beat until blended.
11. Spoon the mixture over the pecan layer.
12. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
13. Remove from the oven and run a knife around the edge of the pan to release it.
14. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack.
15. Cover and chill for at least 8 hours before serving.
16. Top with pecan halves and serve.
